title: What's new on NTG Sports
summary: College football (CFB) — schedules, game pages, and model picks for FBS games.
MLB player props — browse props on game pages or open the Props tab next to CFB.
Sandbox — advanced boards and the model lab live behind sign-in (top-right link).
Home page — sport tabs no longer highlight MLB until you pick a league.

history.title: Navigation & updates
items: Sport tabs (MLB, NBA, CFB, Props) sit below the header; Sandbox and Updates are top-right only.
First-visit popup explains recent changes; use Updates anytime for the full list.
Home no longer looks like the MLB section is already selected.

history.title: CFB & player props
items: CFB slate with live scores, game detail pages, and model leans.
MLB player props explorer and prop parlay slip on game pages.
Protected Sandbox for advanced MLB/NBA boards and the model lab.

history.title: Site launch polish
items: Sign-in for advanced boards and the model lab on the live site.
Hourly odds refresh and clearer “last updated” status on the home page.
MLB totals (O/U) model support on the advanced board.
